plannedFamilies.name: elegy-memory-v1
plannedFamilies.scope: Local non-authoritative import, list, show, export, supersede, and tombstone semantics only.

wrapperSurface.installExpectation: Wrapper installs stage contracts under contracts/, the dedicated CLI under bin/elegy-memory/, and the wrapper surface under wrappers/elegy-memory/.

plannedFamilies.name: elegy-mcp-v1
plannedFamilies.scope: Dedicated MCP descriptor authoring and analysis commands only.

wrapperSurface.installExpectation: Wrapper installs stage contracts under contracts/, the dedicated CLI under bin/elegy-mcp/, and the wrapper surface under wrappers/elegy-mcp/.
Wrapper installs stage contracts under contracts/, the dedicated CLI under bin/elegy-skills/, and the wrapper surface under wrappers/elegy-skills/.

entries.notes: Publishes bundle 1.3.2 as an additive update on the existing 1.x line: agent-response-envelope remains backward compatible, the dedicated summary-only-session-context-envelope durable artifact remains unchanged, Elegy-memory V1 remains bounded and non-authoritative, the shipped elegy-mcp plus elegy-skills surfaces add thin dedicated CLI wrappers over existing descriptor authoring, descriptor analysis, and MCP-to-skill generation flows without claiming unsupported REST/OpenAPI execution or autonomous runtime registration, and wrapper archives now stage install.ps1 plus the matching surface-local skills/<surface>/SKILL.md bridge alongside the dedicated CLI surface when consumers request wrapper assets.
